subject: docs: fix stale js/tabs/ references from March 4 rename
body:
README.md and CLAUDE.md still referenced the old `js/tabs/` directory
path after it was renamed to `js/sections/` on March 4. These were
missed during the prior codebase audit.

Tags: documentation, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch
